title: Approve test-coverage plan + the rank-drop defect fix (ADR-0001)
description: ADR-0001 proposes a node --test + tsx runner, format.ts edge-case tests, and extracting rankDelta() while fixing a latent defect: rank DROPS currently render as '—' (identical to no-change), hiding regressions. Task 4 would change rendered output for down-move rows. Task 5 asks for a decision on whether NaN formatting ('$NaN'/'NaN%') should be guarded. Both are product-facing behavior changes worth a human OK before a delivery agent ships them.

title: Approve rank-drop fix + NaN guard before delivery (Code Review: REQUEST_CHANGES)
description: Review verified two product-facing behavior changes the delivery agent would ship: (1) HIGH — KeywordTable.tsx renders rank drops as '—', identical to no-change, hiding regressions; fix renders down-moves as '↓ N' in danger color, changing rendered output for any future down-move row. (2) MEDIUM — format.ts NaN leaks ('$NaN'/'NaN%') because there is no finite guard; fix returns '—'. Both alter UI output and warrant a human OK.

title: Security findings — 3 Medium remediations for local-seo-agency
description: First security scan completed (0 Critical, 0 High, 3 Medium, 1 Low informational). Each Medium has a concrete fix. Approve which remediations to action.

title: Publish release v0.2.0 — local-seo-agency
description: Release v0.2.0 prepared: package.json bumped 0.1.0->0.2.0, CHANGELOG [0.2.0] confirmed, annotated tag v0.2.0 created locally on merge commit 2cd0814. The bump (MINOR) reflects a pre-1.0 breaking-platform migration. The version bump + changelog are uncommitted and the tag is local-only — approve before publishing.
